items.raw_excerpt: A row is brewing in Catalonia over a pilot programme to deploy police officers in 13 secondary schools in the region with a track record of violence. Many teachers and parents are against the plan, but the regional government considers it necessary.
items.summary_en: Catalonia is facing pushback over a pilot programme that would place police officers in 13 secondary schools with histories of violence. Many teachers and parents oppose the plan, while the regional government says it is necessary for safety.
items.title_en: Catalonia Debates Undercover Police Pilot in Secondary Schools
items.title_original: Why does Catalonia want undercover police in its schools?

items.raw_excerpt: When Swedes talk about celebrating midsommar, they mean Midsummer's Eve, which this year falls on Friday June 19th. It's not a so-called 'red day', but do you still get the day off?
items.summary_en: The article explains whether people in Sweden normally get time off for Midsummer's Eve. Although it is not an official red day, the question matters because many Swedes treat Midsummer as one of the country's major seasonal celebrations.
items.title_en: Do workers in Sweden get Midsummer's Eve off?
items.title_original: Do I get a day off in Sweden at Midsummer?

items.raw_excerpt: Construction has started on northwest Tasmania’s new $60 million shopping centre, due for completion in mid-2027, which will feature a huge new Woolworths as its anchor tenant, along with a Chemist Warehouse. Called Stony Rise …
items.summary_en: Construction has started on a new $60 million shopping centre in northwest Tasmania. The Stony Rise development is expected to open in mid-2027, anchored by Woolworths and Chemist Warehouse.
items.title_en: Construction begins on new Stony Rise shopping centre in Tasmania
items.title_original: Construction starts on Tasmania's newest shopping centre, Woolworths and Chemist Warehouse to anchor - realcommercial.com.au

items.raw_excerpt: Mehr als ein Drittel der 100 Einwohner des schottischen Ortes „Dull“ haben die Einladung angenommen, Ende Jänner 2026 nach Wien zu kommen.
items.summary_en: Vienna's tourism board invited the whole Scottish village of Dull to visit the city. More than a third of the village's roughly 100 residents accepted the invitation to come at the end of January 2026.
items.title_en: Is Vienna Dull? Tourism Board Invites an Entire Scottish Village
items.title_original: „Is Vienna Dull?“: Tourismusverband lädt ganzes schottisches Dorf ein - DiePresse.com

items.raw_excerpt: I motsetning til i nedre Setesdal, stig talet på barn i Bykle kommune. Prognosen for elevtal går opp, då det fødast fleire barn enn på lenge, særs på Hovden. Småbarnsmødrene meiner det er fleire grunnar til dette.
items.summary_en: Unlike lower Setesdal, the number of children is rising in Bykle Municipality, especially around Hovden. School enrollment forecasts are increasing as more babies are being born than in recent years, and local mothers point to several reasons for the trend.
items.title_en: Here we have everything, like a small town, minus the stress
items.title_original: (+) – Her har vi alt, akkurat som i ein liten by, minus stresset - setesdolen.no
